title: 月亮工厂MCF 【Moon Create factory】
description:
以机械动力和社交为核心的整合包，通过机械设备和你朋友一起创造快乐的世界。体验更加浓厚的科技机械之美。

An integrated package centered on mechanical power and social interaction, creating a happy world with your friends through mechanical devices. Experience a stronger beauty of technology and machinery.
body:
MCF是英文 moon Create factory 的缩写 这是一款使用Fabirc、机械动力和社交为核心的整合包，通过机械设备和社交互动来创造属于你和你朋友的快乐世界。与好友体验更加浓厚的科技机械之美。

English

 MCF is the abbreviation for Moon Create factory in English This is an integrated package that uses Fabirc, mechanical power, and social interaction as its core, creating a happy world for you and your friends through mechanical devices and social interaction. Experience a stronger beauty of technology and machinery with friends.

外部MOD

 Excellent mod application effortless https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effortless-building MineMenuFabric https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minemenu-refabricated/ talkbubbles https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/talkbubbles worldedit https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit XaerosWorldMap https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map
